HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to transform your classroom
HowItWorks.step1_desc: Pick any NCERT chapter from Class 6 to 10. Science, Maths, Hindi, English, Social Science — all covered.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Videos, quizzes, mind maps, and tests are generated instantly using AI. In Hindi & English.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: Walk into class with everything ready. Play on the smart screen, take quizzes live, track results.

Mission.label: Our Mission
Mission.quote: Built for my mother — a government school teacher who spends hours preparing lessons after school. TeacherSathi gives her those hours back.
Mission.description: India has 9.6 million teachers in government schools. Most lack access to quality digital resources. TeacherSathi bridges this gap with AI — making NCERT content accessible, interactive, and ready to teach in seconds.

CTA.heading: Empower your teaching with AI-powered NCERT resources today!

Footer.tagline: AI-powered teaching companion for Indian government school teachers. NCERT Class 6-10.
Footer.bottom_text: NCERT-aligned AI content for Classes 6-10 | Hindi + English
Footer.light_mode_desc: Toggle from Dark to Light appearance
Footer.high_contrast_desc: Increase visual contrast and color sharpness
Footer.large_text_desc: Enlarge all typography on the screen by 15%
Footer.readable_font_desc: Change to a highly readable, dyslexia-friendly font
Footer.highlight_links_desc: Add outlines and bold underlines to all links
Footer.text_to_speech_desc: Hover over any text on screen to read it aloud

Dashboard.doubt_desc: Ask Saathi Genie anything about your lessons or syllabus.
Dashboard.play_desc: Start an interactive session or quiz.

Errors.404_desc: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
Errors.404_desc_hi: वह पृष्ठ जो आप ढूंढ रहे हैं वह मौजूद नहीं है या हटा दिया गया है।
Errors.500_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
Errors.500_desc_hi: एक अप्रत्याशित त्रुटि हुई। कृपया पृष्ठ को रीफ्रेश करने का प्रयास करें।
Errors.contact_support: If the problem persists, please contact support:
